title: -Slightly- boosted Performance
description: It slightly boosts the performance of the Minecraft game, adding seasons and QoL features.
body:
![SbP banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/453955bf1ff2b80bbcdf6098af555394b624070a.png)

---
### **This Modpack includes:**
- Many optimisations to ensure Minecraft runs smoothly.
- Seasons and other additions to animations, sound and visuals
- some quality of life (QoL) features
---
<details>
<summary>Helpful tips:</summary>
  
> **Are you having problems loading chunks?**
> 
> To optimise your world, go to 'Edit' > 'Optimise World' on the world selection screen.

> **Do you want to change or deactivate some visuals/particles?**
> 
> You can change it under 'Mods'. Hover over the relevant mod and click on the logo if a settings icon appears.

</details>
